name: Venomous Skin
descs: When winning a Clash with a Skill that applies(including on self) [Vibration] Potency or Count, inflict (# of remaining Coins/2) [Vibration] Potency on the target.
When winning a Clash with a Skill that applies(including on self) [Vibration] Potency or Count, inflict (# of remaining Coins) [Vibration] Potency on the target.

When winning a Clash with a Skill that applies(including on self) [Vibration] Potency or Count, inflict (# of remaining Coins) [Vibration] Potency and (# of remaining Coins/2) [Vibration] Count on the target.
